prompt: I want to understand DHS's threading. I have scheduler_threads set to 8 and full_data_request_concurrency_limit at 20. During pregen with no players online, how many LODs can actually be built in parallel? Is there a bottleneck?

assertions.text: Correctly identifies that pregen occupies 1 worker thread, leaving 7 for builders
Explains that despite concurrency limit of 20, only 7 LODs can build in parallel
Mentions the single-threaded DB executor as a bottleneck
Mentions allowCoreThreadTimeOut or that idle threads die after 60s
